epigraph.quote: We have been extraordinarily lucky with the rain - mainly at night, pinging on the metal roof

moments.quote: She agreed to move to Sunrise in Edgbaston. We had a glass of wine.

moments.place: Brookhouse Farm, Avenbury, Bromyard, Herefordshire, UK
moments.quote: He took us first to Simon's surprise - a vineyard! White grapes. Eventually 3 tons of juice a year!

moments.place: Wilsham House, Oare, Lynton, Devon, UK

moments.quote: Then we drove on past Lorna Doone's Farm to a nearby camp site, near Oare
We passed salt meadows along the estuary. There only flood at very high tides.

images.caption: Appledore from Instow Quay, North Devon
